integration: Alchemy NFT API v3 owned NFTs

evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Uses v3 endpoint eth-mainnet.g.alchemy.com/nft/v3/{key}/getNFTsForOwner with owner, withMetadata, pageSize params. V3 schema correctly references image.cachedUrl/originalUrl and contract.openSeaMetadata.floorPrice; internally consistent and explicitly v3 (not v2). docs_unavailable=true; long-tail handling: consistent + version claimed → 4.
evidence.executability: All fenced blocks parse; imports are complete; pip install line has duplicate httpx (harmless). Mock test patches httpx.AsyncClient.get but uses sync mock return - works with TestClient since response.json/raise_for_status are awaited as coroutines... actually code awaits client.get; mock returns non-coroutine, which would fail. Minor fix needed in test.
evidence.completeness: All six pieces present: (a) API key acquisition with dashboard URL, (b) pip install bash, (c) .env template with ALCHEMY_API_KEY, (d) backend FastAPI code, (e) no frontend but stack is FastAPI-only, (f) pytest test command. Env var names consistent.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Only one link to dashboard.alchemy.com (signup page), no link to docs.alchemy.com/reference/getnftsforowner-v3. No official docs URL near code.

rubric_notes: Long-tail handling applied for docs_unavailable. Test mock has minor async issue but extractor would still write runnable main.py.
